query: Run /handover. We just finished implementing the JWT auth flow in auth.service.ts. We chose Supabase over Auth0 because of cost — Auth0 would add $200/month at our user volume. Two tests are still failing in auth.test.ts at lines 47 and 112. Next step is the password reset email flow.
expected_behavior: Runs git log to check recent commits
Checks whether a handover file for today already exists before deciding to create or append
Creates docs/handovers/ directory if it does not exist
Creates a new handover file (not appending) since none exists for today
Status Snapshot section reflects current project phase
What Was Done lists 'JWT auth flow in auth.service.ts' specifically — not vague
Decisions Made table records Supabase vs Auth0 with the cost rationale
Open TODOs lists the two failing tests in auth.test.ts as P0 or P1 with line numbers
Password reset email appears in Open TODOs or Backlog
Updates .resonance/01_state.md Next Session section to reference the handover path
